channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🔴 Dossier 2026-03-11 — ⚡ Storm · Gold: PLTR
item.description:
🔴 ⚡ Storm · SPY ▼ 0.2% · VIX 25.0

VIX at 25.

🥇 Gold Pick: PLTR — Score: 28/100 (C)

📡 43 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The best time to start a trading journal was your first trade." — Sam
